title: Add claim/belief governance model
objective: Introduce atomic claims, governed beliefs, evidence provenance and review statuses above chunks and graph facts.
requirements: Add MemoryClaim with type, payload/text, evidence refs, confidence, validity, scope, sensitivity and lifecycle status.
Add MemoryBelief with support claims, contradicting claims, status and trusted context eligibility.
Support candidate, accepted, rejected, contested, superseded and expired states.
Rejected claims must remain as negative examples.
Organization accepted beliefs require review metadata.
acceptance_checks: Claims can be created from accepted personal/org memory items.
Candidate claims do not become trusted context.
Accepted belief can reference supporting claims.
Contested belief can reference contradicting claims.
Admin exposes claims and beliefs without secret values.
